'''Calito''' was the third [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Savrant]] in the [[Bacrana system/Legends|Bacrana system]]. The moon was strip-[[Mining/Legends|mined]] by [[Lant Mining Corporation]] and then abandoned. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] it boasted a [[Bacrana System Defense Force]] surveillance post.<ref name="FBS" />

*<!-- 1995-04-XX -->''[[Flashpoint! Brak Sector]]''
